KrdsAccordion.name: aria-label
KrdsAccordion.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsBadge.name: aria-label
KrdsBadge.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsButton.name: aria-label
KrdsButton.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsButton.name: shape
KrdsButton.description:
KRDS `.krds-btn.icon.border` — when "circle", renders a circular
(rounded-full) bordered icon-only button. Additive; the default keeps the
existing per-size rounding. Pair with `size="icon"` for the canonical
circular icon button.

KrdsCalendar.name: aria-label
KrdsCalendar.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsCalendar.name: holidays
KrdsCalendar.description: Explicit holiday dates rendered in the KRDS "day-off" red color (Sundays are auto-colored).

KrdsCarousel.name: aria-label
KrdsCarousel.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsCheckbox.name: aria-label
KrdsCheckbox.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsContextualHelp.name: alignment
KrdsContextualHelp.description: Horizontal anchor alignment of the popover.

KrdsContextualHelp.name: children
KrdsContextualHelp.description: Popover body content. Compose ContextualHelpTitle as first child for a heading.

KrdsContextualHelp.name: className
KrdsContextualHelp.description: Class applied to the outer wrapper.

KrdsContextualHelp.name: closeLabel
KrdsContextualHelp.description: Accessible label for the close button.

KrdsContextualHelp.name: position
KrdsContextualHelp.description: Vertical position of the popover relative to the trigger.

KrdsContextualHelp.name: triggerLabel
KrdsContextualHelp.description: Accessible label for the help trigger button.

KrdsFileUpload.name: aria-label
KrdsFileUpload.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

KrdsFileUpload.name: fileTypeErrorMessage
KrdsFileUpload.defaultValue:
(acceptedLabel) =>
    `지원하지 않는 파일 형식입니다.\n${acceptedLabel} 형식만 업로드 가능합니다.`

KrdsFileUpload.name: maxSizeErrorMessage
KrdsFileUpload.defaultValue:
(maxSizeLabel) =>
    `등록 가능한 파일 용량을 초과하였습니다.\n${maxSizeLabel} 미만의 파일만 등록할 수 있습니다.`

KrdsFileUpload.name: uploadText
KrdsFileUpload.defaultValue: 첨부할 파일을 여기에 끌어다 놓거나, 파일 선택 버튼을 눌러 파일을 직접 선택해주세요.

KrdsHeader.name: sticky
KrdsHeader.description: KRDS #krds-header is sticky + hides on scroll-down / reveals on scroll-up (_header.scss:32-33,148-180).
